answer:
Ahrefs provides a remote, hosted Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that allows AI agents to securely access Ahrefs API data [1]. To use it, you must have an Ahrefs Lite plan or higher [1]. The recommended connection method for supported AI tools is the Streamable HTTP transport at `https://api.ahrefs.com/mcp/mcp` [1].

Please note that the local `@ahrefs/mcp` npm package is deprecated and no longer maintained [2]. You should not use local scripts or standalone clients to access the external MCP endpoint, as this is unsupported; use the official remote server integration provided through your Ahrefs account instead [1].

results.title: What is Ahrefs MCP | Ahrefs for Developers
What Is an MCP Server, and Why Should Marketers Care?
